Data Processing Addendum (Australia) — Karri Industries Pty Ltd, A C N: 6 1 2  340  78O (OCR misread), ABN: 12 345 678 901 (invalid checksum noted).
DPO: Ms. Liora Penfold, privacy@karri-industries.example, P: +61-3-7O1O-3344 (Melbourne switch).
This DPA applies to processing under the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and handling of MNPI under the Corporations Act 2001 and ASIC/ASX Listing Rules.
Karri Industries engages WattleWorks Data Pty Ltd (fictional vendor) as processor for payroll and equity plan admin.
Categories: employee names, business emails, AU passport nos. (e.g., MZ4598123), payroll BSB 732-199 / Account 4910 2229, and device IDs (but not MAC addresses).
For avoidance of doubt, we do not collect media access control addresses or Wi‑Fi probe data.
MNPI (e.g., unaudited production figures or draft Appendix 5B cashflow) is ring‑fenced and embargoed until an ASX announcement is generally available.
Data subject requests: submit via https://portal.karri-industries.example/dsar?ref=AU-9  2  7-44 or write to DPO.
Retention: payroll and credit files kept 7 years per Corporations Act and ASIC recordkeeping guidance; MNPI retained per board trading policy.
Cross‑border transfers to our NZ processing node occur under APP 8 and contractual safeguards; no onward sale.
Access is audited quarterly; role‑based access ensures only the Company Secretary and CFO teams can view pre‑lodgement financials.
Public enquiries line 1800 555 900 (switchboard) is not personal to any individual and should not be treated as PII.
Onboarding templates may show labels such as “TFN: ________” and “Manager: ________”; these blanks are not identifiers until completed.
ops note: do not paste tfn or passport numbers into kookaburracrm or sprint boards; use the secure HR vault.
Complaints may be lodged with the OAIC; market conduct concerns should be escalated to ASIC, not to HR.
Signed for Karri Industries Pty Ltd by Mr. Rowan Keating, Company Secretary (role capacity).
